summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Learning & Development professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, building scalable processes and programs grounded in evidence, and partnering cross-functionally for sustainable impact. I increasingly use AI and automation to eliminate manual work—through human-centered, systematic design.

Conduct focus groups and 1:1 interviews with an NGO leadership team to surface decision-making and {cross|accountability} gaps and recommend process changes
Analyzed 2,000+ {data|employee experiences} to surface satisfaction drivers and guide C-suite decisions on where to focus
